fixed_blockers: Blocker#1 (CRITICAL anti-goal): CPU-bound backtest now runs in a child process (own GIL); pipeline.py/engine untouched; GET /api/sessions + stop endpoint no longer GIL-starved. Deterministic test guard (child pid != parent pid) replaces the time.sleep stub that passed by accident.
Blocker#3 (HIGH): stop endpoint latency resolved by the same process-isolation fix (its asyncio.to_thread calls are no longer GIL-starved).

Blocker#2 (CRITICAL J-08/iter-1 lesson): live-poll tick now re-arms in finally; a single failed/slow apiLoadSession no longer permanently kills the poll, so the AutoRunBar converges to terminal stopped/complete without a manual reload.

Blocker#4 (MEDIUM UX): autoRunProgress memoised + no autoRun flicker on transient poll failure so the Stop button identity stays stable and the first click fires (browser-qa re-verify TC-17 recommended).
Blocker#5 (INFO): J-02 path not in diff and not regressed; browser-qa to re-verify TC-19 per spec.
tests_summary: test_auto_session 26/26 passed; full suite 150 passed / 1 pre-existing out-of-scope fail (test_directions_cache, byte-unchanged) = zero new regressions; ruff clean; frontend tsc+vite build EXIT 0
qa_summary: 21/21 functional test cases PASS. Backend test_auto_session 26/26; full suite 150 pass / 1 confirmed pre-existing out-of-scope (test_directions_cache, not in diff, reproduces with iter-2 stashed). Frontend build EXIT 0. Browser: J-10 (UI Auto Run -> backend session, survives full mid-run reload, server-side terminal+best), J-11 (UI Stop + API stop -> stopped, best preserved as robust winner not raw return, no post-stop iters, durable stopRequested), J-02 (right panel rebinds equity/trades/WF on prior-run select), J-08 (no stale terminal under rapid switch with 61 SessionContainers; list+AutoRunBar agree; aria preserved), J-01 (manual backtest e2e unregressed, 0 console errors). Anti-goals verified at source-diff+test level: contracts.py 0 diff, no new infra, 0 secrets across 54 sessions, legacy in-browser startAutoRun/stopAutoRun deleted, lazy GET. UI-PASS. NOTE (non-blocking): stop endpoint latency 0.027s clean / 10.5s under extreme QA load (6+ sessions + 61-container polling) - still returns without awaiting loop, event-loop non-blocking (TC-05 passed), best preserved, UI converged.
